in_scope: Change `internal/backend/exec/exec.go` so agy command resolution uses default argv `agy --print --model <spec.Model>`.
Keep the reconstructed prompt/context on stdin; do not pass prompt content as command-line arguments.
Preserve `DEBATE_AGY_COMMAND` as an override for argv[0] only, with `--print --model <spec.Model>` still present and ordered after it.
Update the gated agy exec integration test in `internal/backend/exec/integration_test.go` to match the non-interactive `--print` invocation.
out_of_scope: Changes to `internal/backend/acp` or any backend other than the agy exec backend.
Changes to stdin reconstruction, history accumulation, retry handling, cancellation handling, or stderr/error classification.
Changing `DEBATE_AGY_COMMAND` into a full command-string or extra-argument override.
acceptance: For a spec with model `gemini-pro` and no override, a send invokes the command runner with name `agy` and args exactly `["--print", "--model", "gemini-pro"]`.
For `DEBATE_AGY_COMMAND=/usr/local/bin/custom-agy` and model `gemini-flash`, a send invokes name `/usr/local/bin/custom-agy` and args exactly `["--print", "--model", "gemini-flash"]`.
The stdin bytes produced for single-turn and multi-turn sends remain unchanged from the existing tested format.
The exec backend still rejects an empty `Spec.Model` before spawning a subprocess.
The build-tagged `TestIntegration_Agy` completes without hanging and returns non-empty content when `DEBATE_EXEC_INTEGRATION=1`, `AGY_MODEL` is set, and a real agy CLI is available.
validation: DEBATE_EXEC_INTEGRATION=1 AGY_MODEL=$AGY_MODEL go test -tags exec_integration ./internal/backend/exec -run TestIntegration_Agy -count=1
assumptions: The real agy CLI accepts `--print --model <model>` and reads the prompt from stdin before printing one response and exiting.
`DEBATE_AGY_COMMAND` is intended to contain only an executable path or name, not additional flags.
The real integration validation may skip unless `DEBATE_EXEC_INTEGRATION`, `AGY_MODEL`, and an available agy CLI are provided.
